# WebMind AI

> WebMind is an open-source platform for running AI models — large language models (LLMs) and specialized ML models — directly in the web browser using the WebGPU API. No server, no cloud, no API key required. All computation happens locally on the user's device. Built by Alican Atamer.

## What WebMind Does

WebMind provides a browser-based interface for two AI runtimes:

- **WebLLM** (by MLC AI): Enables large language model chat and reasoning in Chrome/Edge using WebGPU. Users download a model once to the browser cache, then run inference entirely client-side.
- **Transformers.js** (by Hugging Face): Enables specialized AI tasks — NLP, computer vision, audio, and multimodal — in the browser via ONNX Runtime (WebAssembly or WebGPU).

Your data never leaves your device. There are no API calls to external servers during inference. Pageview analytics (Vercel Analytics) are the only external data transmission — inference inputs and outputs are never sent anywhere.

## Supported LLM Models (WebLLM)

| Model | Provider | Size | Quantization | License |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Llama 3.2 1B Instruct | Meta | 800 MB | q4f32 | Llama 3.2 Community |
| Llama 3.2 3B Instruct | Meta | 1.9 GB | q4f32 | Llama 3.2 Community |
| Phi-3.5 Mini Instruct | Microsoft | 2.2 GB | q4f16 | MIT |
| Gemma 2 2B IT | Google | 1.5 GB | q4f32 | Gemma |
| Qwen 2.5 1.5B Instruct | Alibaba | 950 MB | q4f32 | Apache 2.0 |
| Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct | Alibaba | 4.5 GB | q4f16 | Apache 2.0 |
| Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 | Mistral AI | 4.3 GB | q4f16 | Apache 2.0 |
| SmolLM2 1.7B Instruct | Hugging Face | 1.1 GB | q4f16 | Apache 2.0 |
| DeepSeek R1 Distill 1.5B | DeepSeek | 1.0 GB | q4f32 | MIT |

## Supported AI Tasks (Transformers.js)

**NLP (Text)**
- Sentiment Analysis — DistilBERT (67 MB)
- Named Entity Recognition — BERT NER (420 MB)
- Translation (200+ languages) — NLLB-200 (1.2 GB)
- Text Summarization — DistilBART (700 MB)
- Question Answering — DistilBERT QA (260 MB)
- Zero-Shot Classification — BART (1.6 GB)
- Text Generation — LaMini (940 MB)

**Vision (Image)**
- Image Classification (1000 ImageNet classes) — ViT (330 MB)
- Object Detection — DETR (160 MB)
- Depth Estimation — Depth Anything (100 MB)

**Audio**
- Speech Recognition (99 languages) — Whisper Tiny (150 MB)

**Multimodal**
- Image-Text Matching — CLIP (600 MB)

## Technical Requirements

- **Browsers**: Chrome 113+ or Edge 113+ (WebGPU required for LLMs)
- **WebAssembly fallback**: Transformers.js models work via CPU/WASM on Firefox and Safari
- **VRAM**: Ranges from 1 GB (Llama 1B) to 6 GB (7B models)
- **Storage**: Models are cached in the browser's cache storage after first download

## Privacy & Data Handling

- Model inference is 100% local — inputs and outputs never leave the device
- No user accounts, no login, no personal data collected
- Vercel Analytics collects anonymized pageview data only (no inference content)
- NEXT_LOCALE cookie stores language preference (1 year, no personal data)
- Open source: verify at https://github.com/atameralican

## Key Facts

- License: MIT (open source)
- Languages: English, Turkish
- Creator: Alican Atamer
- GitHub: https://github.com/atameralican
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alican-atamer/
- Built with: Next.js 16, WebGPU API, MLC AI WebLLM, Hugging Face Transformers.js, Tailwind CSS v4

- Homepage: https://webmind-ai.vercel.app
- WebLLM interface: https://webmind-ai.vercel.app/webllm
- Transformers.js interface: https://webmind-ai.vercel.app/transformers
- About: https://webmind-ai.vercel.app/about
- Privacy Policy: https://webmind-ai.vercel.app/privacy
- Turkish: https://webmind-ai.vercel.app/tr
